calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant does not appear. Respondent, Carmen Chau, appears in pro per.

We waited from 9-9:30am for the appellant. Judge Grotch dismissed the respondent.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, TLK Steel does not appear. Respondent, Carmen Chau appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.

9:20am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Judgment Entered
